customerServices.title: Customer Services
customerServices.intro: Three pillars: Shipment tracking & updates — Tickets (requests & complaints) — Communication log.

tracking.cardDesc: All shipments in a suitable status for the client. Send updates via email or WhatsApp using ready-made templates.
tracking.updateTextPlaceholder: Write the update for the client…
tracking.selectShipmentFirst: Select a shipment from the table to add an update.
tracking.noEmail: No email address available for this client.
tracking.noPhone: No phone number available for this client.

tickets.cardDesc: Create ticket → Assign to department (Operations / Sales / Accounting) → Reply → Close from Customer Service.
tickets.searchPlaceholder: Search by ticket number or client…
tickets.replyPlaceholder: Write your reply or status update…
tickets.replyRequired: Please enter a reply before sending.

comms.clientSaidPlaceholder: Summary of what the client reported or asked…
comms.issuePlaceholder: The specific business challenge or opportunity…
comms.replyActionPlaceholder: How you replied or what the next action is…

attendance.title: Attendance
attendance.geoHint: Allow location access for accurate office distance. If disabled, clock-in may fail when location is required.
attendance.scheduleBlockBeforeStart: Clock-in is not allowed yet: before {{start}} ({{tz}}). Wait until the scheduled start or ask an admin to adjust policy / your timezone.

excuses.submitHint: Fill in the form and submit your excuse request.

admin.reportHint: Filter and review attendance report data by employee, period, and status.

locationPanel.title: Locations & distance
locationPanel.officeMapAria: Map of office location and allowed radius
locationPanel.noOffice: Office location is not set. Ask an admin to configure it in Settings.
locationPanel.geoErrorInstructions: Open this page on a phone or tablet, turn on GPS / location services, and allow the browser to access your location when prompted.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.errorMarkAll: Failed to mark all as read.

sdForms.chartsNoData: No chart data for this range.

clients.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, company, phone, email…
clients.errorAttachmentPreviewPopup: Allow pop-ups for this site to preview files in a new tab.

sections.notesGuidance: Sales guidance — key info before contact

fields.name: Name
fields.shipping_problems_hint: Describe problems or challenges the client has faced with shipping before (delays, fines, documentation issues, cargo damage, poor treatment from another shipping company).

accountings.title: Accounting
accountings.exportPdfSoon: PDF export will be available in a future update.
accountings.bulkReminderSoon: Balance reminders will be available in a future update.
accountings.bankEmpty: No non-cash treasury balances by currency yet. Record treasury entries to see bank totals here.
accountings.ledgerModalHint: Detailed transaction history can be tracked from invoices and payments. Full ledger export is planned.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.subtitle: Manage invoices, payments, and exports
invoices.noPermission: You do not have permission to view invoices.

treasury.title: Treasury
treasury.noPermission: You do not have permission to view treasury.
treasury.totalsDisclaimer: Stat totals mix currencies as compact numbers; use movements and per-currency running balances for detail.
treasury.reconNote: Matching is local only; full reconciliation with persistence is planned for a later release.
treasury.reconFillFromEntries: Fill ledger from bank movements (filtered list)
treasury.validationEntry: Choose a source and a valid non-negative amount.
treasury.validationTransfer: Choose two different accounts and a valid amount.
treasury.validationExpense: Choose a category, description, and a valid amount.

expensesPage.title: Expenses
expensesPage.noPermission: You do not have permission to view expenses.
expensesPage.disclaimer: Charts and totals may mix currencies; use tables and filters for detail.
expensesPage.validation: Choose category, description, and a valid amount.

visits.title: Visit Log
visits.vendorHint: Choose a partner from the list.
visits.chartsNoData: No chart data for this range.

shipments.title: Shipments
shipments.financialsNoBl: Assign a BL number to load linked expenses.
shipments.financialsNoExpenses: No expenses found for this BL.

fin.tabBEmpty: No cost lines yet. Record shipment expenses in Expenses to see them here.
fin.bucketShippingSub: Ocean freight, THC, B/L, and related charges
fin.bucketOtherSub: Expenses that did not match standard categories
fin.bucketOtherEmpty: No uncategorized expenses for this BL.
fin.vendorApplied: Vendor applied to all lines in this section.
fin.notifySalesOk: Sales notification logged on this shipment.
fin.tabBInvoiceHint: Sell prices are stored on a draft client invoice for this shipment. Save to sync with invoices and shipment selling total.
fin.pricingNoLines: Add at least one included line with a valid sell amount.
fin.pricingNotDraft: Only draft invoices can be edited from here. Use Invoices for issued documents.
fin.invoiceNoClient: Shipment has no client — cannot create an invoice.
fin.netCostHint: Total cost uses shipment aggregates when available; breakdown above is from posted expenses by category.
fin.notifySalesHint: When vendor bills are complete, log a handoff for sales using the button below (recorded on the shipment activity trail).
fin.salesBannerSub: Edit sell per cost line and optional handling fee. Saving updates a draft client invoice and shipment selling totals.
fin.marginNote: Shipment-level margin when selling total is set.
fin.savePricingHint: Requires accounting.manage or financial.manage. Issued invoices cannot be re-priced from this screen.
fin.invoiceTagline: Shipping agency · invoice preview from posted costs
fin.invoiceLinesEmpty: Add expenses for this BL to populate invoice lines, or save pricing first in your usual tools.
fin.invoiceMixedCurrency: Totals by currency are listed above per line.
fin.emailSoon: Connect e-mail in a future release.
fin.invoiceStatusHint: Payments below update the client invoice and treasury entries.
fin.addPaymentHint: Record a payment against the client invoice linked to this shipment.
fin.auditSub: Financial events logged for this shipment (expenses, invoice lines, payments, notifications).
fin.auditEmpty: No activity yet — financial actions on this shipment will appear here.
fin.tabAEditHint: Enter amounts and save per line. Descriptions are prefixed automatically so lines stay grouped. Requires accounting.manage.
fin.errorNoCategory: Expense category missing in system (e.g. FRT, THC). Seed or create categories first.
fin.errorInvalidAmount: Enter a valid amount (0 or greater).

settings.title: System Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage company information, notifications, and session behaviour.

statuses.intro: Manage shipment tracking labels, CRM client statuses, partner (vendor) types, and all customer-service lookups (ticket states, types, priorities, communication categories) in one place.
statuses.shipmentsHint: Used on shipment tracking and related customer service views.
statuses.clientsHint: Used when classifying clients in CRM.
statuses.vendorPartnerTypesHint: Used when classifying partners (vendors). The code is stored on each vendor and used in accounting filters.
statuses.ticketsHint: Used as ticket workflow states in Customer Service.
statuses.ticketTypesHint: Categories when creating or filtering tickets.
statuses.ticketPrioritiesHint: Priority options on tickets (ordering and labels).
statuses.communicationLogTypesHint: Categories for communication log entries in Customer Service.

company.locationHint: This location will be used when evaluating employee attendance.

attendancePolicy.title: Attendance policy
attendancePolicy.subtitle: Grace period, work hours, geofence and location requirements.
